# VoxBulk

> VoxBulk is an AI assistant platform that automates conversations, workflows and data collection for businesses. Live services include end-to-end recruitment automation (CV screening, scheduling, AI voice interviews and scoring), AI-run WhatsApp surveys, and QR-code customer feedback.

VoxBulk builds intelligent voice and messaging tools that save teams time and deliver real insights. All data stays within UK/EU data centres, traffic is encrypted in transit and at rest, and the platform is GDPR compliant with a Data Processing Agreement available to every customer.

## Services

- [Recruitment Automation](https://voxbulk.com/recruitment): Bulk CV ingestion and ATS scoring, tailored AI interview questions, automated candidate scheduling, fully AI-run voice interviews, scored results dashboards, and one-click final-round booking via Cronofy or Calendly.
- [WhatsApp Surveys](https://voxbulk.com/surveys): AI-built WhatsApp surveys that send questions, collect responses and deliver named or anonymous feedback reports.
- [Customer Feedback](https://voxbulk.com/feedback): QR-code WhatsApp feedback collection in 50+ languages with structured reporting.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://voxbulk.com/): Product overview and what VoxBulk does.
- [Pricing](https://voxbulk.com/pricing): Plans and pricing with monthly and yearly options.
- [Contact / demo](https://voxbulk.com/contact): Talk to the team or book a demo.

- [Legal & policies](https://voxbulk.com/legal-policies): Index of legal and compliance documents.
- [Privacy Policy](https://voxbulk.com/privacy): How VoxBulk handles personal data.
- [Terms of Service](https://voxbulk.com/terms): Terms governing use of VoxBulk.
- [Cookie Policy](https://voxbulk.com/cookies): Use of cookies on the site.
- [GDPR](https://voxbulk.com/gdpr): GDPR commitments and data processing details.
